channel.title: Vishal Tyagi
channel.description: Engineering projects, case studies, and notes from Vishal Tyagi.

item.title: Comparing Event-Deduplication Strategies for Client-Side Analytics
item.description: An open investigation into time-windowed vs. idempotency-key deduplication for client-emitted analytics events, prompted by dedup work on the Runo product analytics layer.

item.title: Modeling 'Either, Or, Both' States Without a Combinatorial Explosion
item.description: An open look at how the gsmNCloud three-state model from the hybrid telephony work generalizes to other 'a user can have A, B, or both' product situations.

item.title: Designing an Event Taxonomy for Amplitude
item.description: How to name events and properties so analytics stays usable as the product grows, instead of becoming hundreds of one-off strings.

item.title: Docker for Local Development: A Practical Workflow
item.description: A docker-compose setup for local dev that stays fast — bind mounts, layer caching, and the tradeoffs that actually matter day to day.

item.title: Setting Up a Flutter Development Environment on Linux
item.description: A practical setup for Flutter + Dart on Linux — SDK install, editor config, emulator, and the gotchas that waste the first hour.

item.title: Runo Product Analytics & Amplitude Instrumentation
item.description: Worked on a product analytics layer at Runo — Amplitude provider abstraction, event taxonomy, user/company traits, deduplication, and platform-aware tracking across auth, billing, CRM, and call workflows.

item.title: Sizing an event deduplication window
item.description: A short note on why a fixed time window for analytics event deduplication needs tuning, not just existing.

item.title: Turning scattered product behavior into systems
item.description: A recurring theme in product engineering: ambiguous, duplicated behavior across screens is more dangerous than it looks, and the fix is rarely glamorous.

item.title: Runo Hybrid Telephony — Cloud & GSM Calling
item.description: Contributed to hybrid telephony support at Runo — letting users call via cloud or GSM, with call-medium selection, virtual number assignment, and consistent reporting across logs, exports, and analytics.

item.title: Designing Hybrid Telephony for a Sales CRM
item.description: A deeper look at how cloud and GSM calling were unified into one hybrid telephony model at Runo, and what broke before the model existed.

item.title: Keeping sandbox traffic out of production analytics
item.description: Why analytics initialization should check environment/host before sending any events, not just before reporting them.

item.title: Runo Admin Web Migration
item.description: Contributed to migrating Runo's admin web surface to Flutter Web, building reusable components for bulk upload/deletion, integration dialogs, and sheet validation.

item.title: NMOLD Inventory Management Redevelopment
item.description: Contributed to redeveloping NMOLD's inventory management system on Flutter, Express, and MongoDB, replacing a legacy Python/Laravel stack, and added image recognition to reduce manual data entry.

item.title: Smart Irrigation IoT System
item.description: Built an IoT-based smart irrigation system using NodeMCU and sensors for temperature, humidity, and soil moisture, with a Flutter app visualizing data and an SVM model forecasting irrigation needs.

item.title: image_hotspot — Flutter Package
item.description: Published a Flutter package for defining interactive, clickable hotspot areas on images, useful for floor plans, diagrams, and annotated photos.

item.title: PIET Quest Exam Portal
item.description: Built an exam portal with cheating-detection-based question reordering, randomized question sets, and automation for report downloads and question uploads.

item.title: OMR Sheet Reading Automation at 90,000+ Scale
item.description: Built a Python automation script for OMR sheet reading that processed over 90,000 sheets, reducing manual checking effort for large-scale assessment workflows.

item.title: Blockchain-Based NGO Donation Tracking
item.description: Built a blockchain platform for transparent NGO donation and payout tracking, aimed at increasing trust in how charitable funds move.

item.title: ENTHRAL.IN Supplier Price Change Detection
item.description: Built a supplier scraping and comparison workflow that flags pricing/listing differences against an OpenCart storefront and prepares margin-based updates.
